items.title: NBA told EDNY prosecutors they prefer Terry Rozier keeps bond conditions that prevent him from playing in NBA.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
NBA told EDNY prosecutors they prefer Terry Rozier keeps bond conditions that prevent him from playing in NBA. 

Feds say Rozier texted with someone on his no-contact list and are investigating if co-defendant contacted witnesses about the case, possibly on his behalf www.nytimes.com/athletic/736...

media.title: NBA, Hornets ask prosecutors to keep Terry Rozier’s no-contact order in place
media.description: Federal prosecutors said that Rozier has already texted one person on the list of people he is not allowed to contact.

items.title: Terry Rozier Pleads Not Guilty to Bribery Charges, Awaits February Trial
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Terry Rozier Pleads Not Guilty to Bribery Charges, Awaits February Trial Yahoo Sports

items.title: Wrote about the big NBA thing that happened today: the latest hearing for Terry Rozier in federal court and a request from a federal judge for the NBA to advise whether they want him to be able to play in the NBA.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Wrote about the big NBA thing that happened today: the latest hearing for Terry Rozier in federal court and a request from a federal judge for the NBA to advise whether they want him to be able to play in the NBA.

Free to read for all: www.nytimes.com/athletic/734...

media.title: Terry Rozier’s trial date set for 2027 as NBA future grows uncertain
media.description: Rozier has pleaded not guilty to all four charges. The judge set a Feb. 8, 2027 date for trial.

items.title: Terry Rozier pleads not guilty to new charges; Feb. trial set
items.author: ESPN
items.body_excerpt: Terry Rozier pleads not guilty to new charges; Feb. trial set ESPN

items.title: Rozier's lawyer has asked the judge to lift a bond restriction that effectively keeps him from playing in the NBA. Judge has asked the NBA to weigh in by Monday. The trial date for the case has been set for Feb. 8, 2027. Rozier has asked the judge to dismiss the charges.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Rozier's lawyer has asked the judge to lift a bond restriction that effectively keeps him from playing in the NBA. Judge has asked the NBA to weigh in by Monday. The trial date for the case has been set for Feb. 8, 2027. Rozier has asked the judge to dismiss the charges.

items.title: Jim Trusty, lawyer for Terry Rozier: "The NBA has literally flagrantly fouled the presumption of innocence...They're still trying to find ways to pretend they're victims & that Terry should be prohibited from playing basketball... They are not on the side of angels in this case."
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Jim Trusty, lawyer for Terry Rozier: "The NBA has literally flagrantly fouled the presumption of innocence...They're still trying to find ways to pretend they're victims & that Terry should be prohibited from playing basketball... They are not on the side of angels in this case."

items.title: The trial for Terry Rozier and the 3 other defendants in the NBA insider trading gambling case has been set to begin Feb. 8, 2027.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: The trial for Terry Rozier and the 3 other defendants in the NBA insider trading gambling case has been set to begin Feb. 8, 2027.
